allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content index.html\) -replace 'family=Playfair\\+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter', 'family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;800&family=Inter' | Set-Content index.html; \(Get-Content services.html\) -replace 'family=Playfair\\+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter', 'family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;800&family=Inter' | Set-Content services.html; \(Get-Content gestion.html\) -replace 'family=Playfair\\+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter', 'family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;800&family=Inter' | Set-Content gestion.html; \(Get-Content investir.html\) -replace 'family=Playfair\\+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter', 'family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;800&family=Inter' | Set-Content investir.html; \(Get-Content contact.html\) -replace 'family=Playfair\\+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter', 'family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;800&family=Inter' | Set-Content contact.html")
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im=Image.open\('Logo MADYS final blanc.png'\); print\(im.size, im.mode\)")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -File | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match '\\.\(png|jpg|jpeg|webp|avif\)$' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 6 Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(sed -i "s|'Playfair Display', serif|'Cormorant Garamond', serif|g; s|'Inter', sans-serif|'Jost', sans-serif|g; s|'Montserrat', sans-serif|'Jost', sans-serif|g" *.html style.css components.js)

Bash(sed -i "s|.legal-inner h2 { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.4rem;|.legal-inner h2 { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.65rem;|" confidentialite.html mentions-legales.html)

Bash(sed -i "s|.contact-info-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.6rem;|.contact-info-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.9rem;|; s|.form-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.5rem;|.form-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.8rem;|" contact.html)
Bash(sed -i "s|.step-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.7rem;|.step-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 2rem;|" gestion.html)
Bash(sed -i "s|.why-stat-num { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 2.2rem;|.why-stat-num { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 2.6rem;|" index.html)

Bash(sed -i "s|.stat-num { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 2.8rem;|.stat-num { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 3.3rem;|; s|.process-card-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.25rem;|.process-card-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.5rem;|" investir.html)

Bash(sed -i "s|font-size: clamp\(1.9rem, 3.5vw, 2.8rem\);|font-size: clamp\(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem\);|; s|.cta-band-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp\(1.8rem, 3.5vw, 2.8rem\);|.cta-band-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp\(2.1rem, 4vw, 3.2rem\);|; s|font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: var\(--dark\);|font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 600; color: var\(--dark\);|" style.css)

Bash(sed -i "s|  font-size: clamp\(2.6rem, 6vw, 4.8rem\);|  font-size: clamp\(3rem, 6.5vw, 5.4rem\);|; s|font-size: clamp\(1.2rem, 2.4vw, 1.7rem\);|font-size: clamp\(1.4rem, 2.6vw, 2rem\);|" index.html)
Bash(sed -i "s|'Cormorant Garamond', serif|'Montserrat', sans-serif|g; s|'Jost', sans-serif|'Montserrat', sans-serif|g" *.html style.css components.js)

Bash(sed -i "s|.contact-info-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.9rem;|.contact-info-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem;|; s|.form-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem;|.form-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.4rem;|" contact.html)

Bash(sed -i "s|.stat-num { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 3.3rem;|.stat-num { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 2.8rem;|; s|.process-card-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem;|.process-card-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 1.2rem;|" investir.html)
